name: sigcomm-skills
description: A 12-skill depth pack for ACM SIGCOMM submissions: the single-February-deadline flagship venue fit, HotCRP double-blind submission audits, the rebuttal + shepherd-run one-shot revision, deployment- and measurement-grade evaluation, ACM artifact badges and reproducible 'runnable papers', and TAPS camera-ready proceedings. Grounded in the ACM SIGCOMM 2026 CFP, submission and camera-ready pages, and sigcomm.org award pages checked on 2026-07-09.
